_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.4/SWTools-1.1.4-Setup.exe, setup sha256 7c4e3a5b61c53f523450d318c66b371a75dbc79a574419e745017b08379d8842. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
